steps_completed.task: Refactor file-level mocks: replace vi.mock('@/lib/api/client') with hook-level mocks for useMarket, useMarketEvents, useAccountRisk (from '@/lib/query/hooks') and useSession (from '@/features/session/context' with importActual to preserve SessionProvider). Add vi.useFakeTimers()/vi.setSystemTime() in beforeEach and vi.useRealTimers() in afterEach.
Refactor existing 7 tests to work with hook-level mocks. All 7 existing tests pass with new mock setup.
Add loading state test: mock useMarket to return { isLoading: true }. Assert SVG spinner is rendered.
Add error state test: mock useMarket to return { error: new Error('Market not found') }. Assert ErrorMessage with 'Market not found' text.
Add Volume/Liquidity/Expires display test with fake timers. Assert Volume: 45.0K, Liquidity: 150.0K, and Expires pattern.
Add PositionCard visible test: mock useSession with configuredSession, mock useAccountRisk with risk data. Assert 'Your Position', minAsset, utilization, and trade count.
Add PositionCard hidden test: mock useSession with unconfiguredSession. Assert 'Your Position' is NOT in the document.
Add EventRow rendering test: mock useMarketEvents with 2 events. Assert table headers and event data.
Add EventRow expand/collapse test: fireEvent.click on table row to expand payload JSON, click again to collapse.
Add ResolveMarketPanel integration test: mock useSession with configuredSession. Assert 'Resolve Market' heading is visible.
Run full test suite to verify all 15 tests (7 existing + 8 new) pass.
